news.headline: Fed's Logan: I pay a lot of attention to financial conditions indexes.
Fed's Logan: My business contacts are optimistic looking forward and are aware of risks.
Vince partners with Teamwork Commerce to install advanced POS at London store; enhancing shopping experience.
news.summary: Today, in London on October 21, 2024, Teamwork Commerce, a prominent omnichannel solution provider, revealed a new partnership with Vince, a top-tier fashion retailer. The collaboration aims to implement Teamwork Commerce's cutting-edge Point-of-Sale (POS) system at Vince's flagship store in London. Vince, renowned for its high-end fashion offerings, specializes in luxury apparel and...

news.headline: Ban Ki-moon promotes green travel at Chery RIDE GREEN LIFE in China; draws thousands of participants; event on 20th Oct.
news.summary: In Wuhu, China, on October 20, 2024, Mr. Ban Ki-moon, the 8th Secretary-General of the United Nations and Chairman of the Ban Ki-moon Foundation, attended the Chery's RIDE GREEN LIFE event, where thousands of participants gathered. The event aimed to promote environmentally friendly transportation methods.

news.headline: Mentor Capital repurchases 11.6% of stock, remaining net cash over 200% of share price.
news.summary: A company based in Plano, Texas, Mentor Capital, has recently announced that it repurchased 11.6% of its outstanding stock. This move has left the company with a surplus of net cash that exceeds 200% of the current share price.

news.headline: NanoXplore's Q1 results will be discussed in a webcast on Nov 7th, 2024, with financial results released on Nov 6th, 2024.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, NanoXplore (TSX: GRA and OTCQX: NNXPF) announced a change in the release date of their financial results. The information was initially set to be disclosed on Tuesday, November 6, 2024, but it has been rescheduled for Wednesday, November 6, 2024. Additionally, the webcast, originally planned for Wednesday, November 7, 2024, will now take place on Thursday, November 7, 2024. Investors and stakeholders should take note of these revised dates for the upcoming financial updates from NanoXplore.

news.headline: SCS Technologies appoints Will Taylor as Director of Engineering. Taylor has 20+ years experience in oil and gas production.
news.summary: In Houston today, SCS Technologies (SCS) revealed Will Taylor as their newest Director of Engineering. With over 20 years of expertise in onshore and offshore product design, project management, manufacturing, and quality assurance, Taylor will play a crucial role in the company. SCS specializes in CO2 measurement systems, methane vapor recovery units, and petroleum LACT units. Taylor's background in oil and gas production engineering aligns perfectly with SCS's focus.

news.headline: Microwave Power Transmission Market to reach USD 939.5 million by 2031, with a CAGR of 24.1% from 2023. Key markets in Asia Pacific and North America. Advancements in technology and applications driving growth.
news.summary: The microwave power transmission industry was valued at US$167.0 million in 2022 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 24.1% from 2023 to 2031, reaching US$939.5 million by 2031. This growth is driven by the interest in space-based solar power generation, enabling the beaming of energy from space-based arrays to ground-based receivers. Microwave transmission systems offer a reliable alternative to traditional grid-based electricity supply, particularly beneficial for remote areas. The market is fueled by applications in remote, rural, military, and emergency response scenarios, along with the demand for power solutions in satellite ground stations and telecommunications infrastructure, including 5G networks. Advancements in technology, cost-cutting measures, and the development of lightweight rectenna arrays and solid-state microwave amplifiers are driving market expansion. Key findings include near-field technology driving demand, space solar power station as the largest application segment, and Asia Pacific expected to hold the largest market share from 2023 to 2031, with North America holding a 23.0% share in 2022.

news.headline: Graylog introduces new capabilities for SIEM like data routing, risk scoring, and AI reports, enhancing threat detection.
news.summary: In Houston, a company has introduced new features focusing on API security. These capabilities consist of sophisticated data routing, asset-centric risk evaluation, and AI-formulated investigation summaries.

news.headline: Zeta Global acquires LiveIntent enhancing its marketing capabilities. Strengthening Zeta's AI-powered platform.
news.summary: Zeta Global (NYSE: ZETA) has finalized the acquisition of LiveIntent, a leader in people-based marketing, solidifying its position in AI-Powered Marketing Cloud. The acquisition includes LiveIntent’s assets, publisher network, and channel capabilities, to enhance the Zeta Marketing Platform and strengthen the Zeta Data Cloud. This strategic move is expected to boost Zeta’s capabilities in AI-powered marketing. The acquisition marks a significant milestone for Zeta Global in expanding its market presence.

news.headline: Global farm management software and data analytics market projected to reach $19.83 billion by 2034, growing at 14.49% CAGR.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Global Farm Management Software and Data Analytics Market: Focus on Application, Software, Software Type, Service Offering, and Region" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market for farm management software and data analytics is estimated to increase from $4.52 billion in 2023 to $19.83 billion by 2034, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 14.49% between 2024 and 2034.

news.headline: San Juan Basin Royalty Trust (NYSE: SJT) will not distribute cash in Oct 2024 due to production costs exceeding proceeds.
news.summary: Today, in Dallas on October 21, 2024, Argent Trust Company, acting as the trustee of the San Juan Basin Royalty Trust (NYSE: SJT), announced it will not be issuing a monthly cash distribution to unit holders. The company did not disclose the specific reason for this decision. This news affects individuals who hold Units of beneficial interest in the Trust.

news.headline: Terry Rasmussen appointed Chair of H.B. Fuller's Board of Directors, succeeding Mitau post retirement on Jan 22, 2025.
news.summary: In St. Paul, Minnesota, H.B. Fuller Company (NYSE: FUL) revealed that Teresa (Terry) J. Rasmussen will be taking over as Chair of the Board of Directors after the retirement of Lee R. Mitau on January 22, 2025. This decision was backed by Celeste Mastin, the company's president and CEO, who praised Rasmussen's leadership qualities. This change marks a significant transition within the company's governance structure.

news.headline: TriNet appoints Varsha Kakati as VP and Country Leader for Hyderabad, India Ops. NYSE: TNET.
news.summary: Dublin, California - On October 21, 2024, TriNet revealed that Varsha Kakati has been appointed as the Vice President and India Country Leader. TriNet, a prominent provider of HR solutions for small and medium-sized businesses, traded on NYSE under TNET. This strategic move is aimed at expanding the company's influence in the Indian market.

news.headline: Foresters Financial names Andrea Frossard as Chief Commercial Officer overseeing North American Sales and Marketing.
news.summary: A 25-year veteran in the industry has been chosen to lead North American Sales, Product, and Enterprise Marketing. The announcement was made by Foresters Financial™ in Toronto on October 21, 2024. Foresters is a global life insurance company dedicated to empowering its members to make a positive impact.

news.headline: Willdan chosen to consult for City of Palmdale's smart city program, with a 3-year contract focusing on innovative solutions.
news.summary: In Anaheim, California, Willdan Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: WLDN) has secured a significant deal with the City of Palmdale. Under a three-year contract, Willdan will serve as the city's consultant for a new initiative centered on pioneering solutions and smart city initiatives. The program aims to tackle crucial infrastructure challenges by exploring alternative technology and innovative energy projects. Willdan will work closely with the City's staff to create project scopes and seek out funding opportunities for these ventures. This partnership underscores the commitment to applying and testing cutting-edge approaches to drive sustainable development and address urban challenges effectively.

news.headline: Rayonier Inc. (NYSE:RYN) declares Q4 dividend of $0.285/share; payable on Dec. 31, 2024, to shareholders of record on Dec. 17, 2024.
news.summary: Rayonier Inc. disclosed that their board of directors has approved a fourth quarter cash dividend of $0.285 per common share for shareholders, payable on December 31, 2024, to shareholders registered by December 17, 2024. In addition, the board, acting as the general partner of Rayonier, L.P., also declared a fourth quarter cash distribution of $0.285 per share.

news.headline: SEALSQ offers comprehensive Root of Trust solution integrating PKI and hardware for complete security, trusted by businesses.
news.summary: In Geneva, Switzerland, on October 21, 2024, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) disclosed their partnership with OISTE Foundation and WISeKey, revealing that their fully integrated Root of Trust (RoT) offers an extensive security solution covering semiconductor Public Key Infrastructure (PKI), post-quantum technology, hardware, and software products. SEALSQ's RoT is a unique offering in the market, ensuring security for cryptographic key management and device-level security simultaneously, making it one of the most complete security solutions available. By utilizing SEALSQ’s RoT solutions, businesses and organizations can establish trust in their digital operations across all levels. SEALSQ stands out in the industry for providing a comprehensive security approach by integrating the entire security stack.

news.headline: Economic report values GPS backup at $14.6 billion, NextNav's solution can save US $663 million per day in outage.
news.summary: NextNav’s new 3D terrestrial positioning, navigation, and timing (PNT) solution in the lower 900 MHz band is projected to save the US economy a significant $663 million in the event of a single day of global GPS outage. This innovative technology has the capacity to provide substantial benefits and cost savings in a scenario where traditional GPS signals are disrupted.

news.headline: Pineapple Energy to start work on two new commercial solar projects in November 2024.
news.summary: Pineapple Energy has disclosed the addition of two new commercial solar projects to their pipeline. The projects are anticipated to commence in November 2024.

news.headline: Research report on EU Green Deal impact on smart agriculture market in Europe and other countries from 2020-2024.
news.summary: A recent report titled "EU Green Deal - Impact Analysis on Europe/Other Countries Smart Agriculture Market" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The European Union's Green Deal strives for a climate-neutral and sustainable Europe by 2050, focusing on the Farm-to-Fork (F2F) and Biodiversity strategies. This report provides a comprehensive analysis for the years 2020-2024, emphasizing the trade impact, Sustainable Development Goals, and country-specific analysis for the smart agriculture market. The initiative aims to positively impact the global market, affecting the economies of various regions.

news.headline: Jollibee launches first loyalty program, Jollibee Rewards, offering freebies & exclusive deals. Join by Nov 15, 2024.
news.summary: Customers can use their Jolly Points to access a variety of exciting rewards at Jollibee, both online and in-store. These perks include free food items, special promotions, and unexpected treats. The beloved global restaurant chain, Jollibee, announced this exciting opportunity in West Covina, California on October 21, 2024.

news.headline: Schouw & Co. starts share buy-back program worth DKK 200 million from Mar 4 to Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: Schouw & Co. started a share repurchase scheme on March 4, 2024, as per Company Announcement no. 13 released on March 1, 2024. The programme allows Schouw & Co. to buy back shares worth a total of DKK 200 million between March 4, 2024, and December 31, 2024.

news.headline: HMD partners with Venom for smartphone fusion demo; showcases new technology in glass chamber.
news.summary: A special Smart Outfit has been developed in partnership with Sony Pictures' upcoming action-thriller Venom: The Last Dance to showcase the features of HMD's newest smartphone technology. Fusion Fusion, the innovative smartphone, functions similar to a symbiote. This unique collaboration highlights the merging of fashion and technology, enhancing user experience.

news.headline: Batteries Plus franchisee in Pensacola partners with hospitals, schools, and more to energize community.
news.summary: Entrepreneur Matt Hartford of Batteries Plus in Pensacola, Florida, is leading impactful B2B initiatives, boosting local communities in the Florida Panhandle. His efforts have garnered attention due to his effective partnerships, showcasing the potential for collaboration. On October 21, 2024, Hartford's proactive approach is setting a precedent for success, with the community reaping the benefits. This demonstrates the significance of fostering partnerships for growth and development.

news.headline: Viz.ai expands into lung disease with NLP capabilities for improved patient care; aims to accelerate diagnosis.
news.summary: San Francisco-based Viz.ai disclosed today the enhancement of its lung disease software capabilities. The company, known for AI-driven disease detection and care coordination, introduced new natural language processing (NLP) features to supplement its existing imaging AI technology. The upgraded software aims to broaden Viz.ai's pulmonary solutions by extracting clinical data from electronic health records (EHR) to pinpoint and oversee patients with lung ailments. This addition will be integrated into the company's platform to expedite the process.

news.headline: T-Mobile and Miller Electric team up to operate autonomous vehicles in Jacksonville using a 5G private network.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, a partnership between T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) and Miller Electric Company is bringing the future of autonomous public transit to Jacksonville, Florida's waterfront area. Through a 5G private network, the collaboration aims to connect a fleet of autonomous vehicles (AVs) along the city’s waterfront and urban core as part of Jacksonville’s Ultimate Urban Circulator program. This initiative by T-Mobile and Miller Electric is set to enhance visitors' experience in the area and mark a significant step towards fully autonomous public transportation.

news.headline: Coloplast A/S FY 2023/24 earnings release conference call on 5th Nov 2024 at 11.00 CET for investors and analysts. Webcast will be available.
news.summary: On Tuesday, November 5, 2024, from 11:00 to 12:00 CET, Coloplast will hold a conference call to discuss its interim financial results for the fiscal year 2023/24. During this event, the company will present the financial results and address inquiries from investors and financial analysts. A presentation will be uploaded to Coloplast's website about 1 hour before the call. The webcast of the conference call will be accessible during and post the event for those unable to attend in real-time.

news.headline: 2024 Crossroads Summit offers insight on election's macroeconomic impact. Trump plans 15% corporate tax, Harris plans 28%. Uncertainty on deficit.
news.summary: The 2024 Crossroads Summit is being highlighted as an event for people concerned about how the next election may impact their financial well-being or global affairs due to the potential chaos that can lead to opportunities. The political climate is currently highly divisive and the two contrasting candidates, Republican Donald Trump and Democrat Kamala Harris, have very different corporate tax policies. Trump aims to reduce the corporate tax rate from 21% to 15% while Harris plans to raise it to 28%. The impact of these policies on corporate profits, stock market, GDP, and federal budget deficit remains uncertain. According to the Penn Wharton Budget Model, both candidates' policies are projected to increase the federal budget deficit.

news.headline: Inhibikase Therapeutics closes $110M financing, potential $275M; advancing IkT-001Pro for PAH treatment in women aged 30-60.
news.summary: A new molecular entity, IkT-001Pro, is being developed as the first oral, potentially disease-modifying treatment for a rapidly fatal illness that mainly affects women aged 30 to 60. Inhibikase Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: IKT) announced the completion of a private placement, raising about $110 million through the sale of common stock and warrants. The total financing could reach approximately $275 million upon the full exercise of the warrants. The funds will support the Phase 2b ‘702’ trial for Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension (PAH) and general corporate operations, emphasizing the company's focus on developing protein kinase inhibitors to tackle Cardiopulmonary and Neurodegenerative diseases through Abelson Tyrosine Kinase inhibition. The announcement was made jointly from BOSTON and ATLANTA on October 21, 2024.

news.headline: Nucleus RadioPharma expands with 2 new facilities totaling 100,000 sq ft in Arizona and Pennsylvania, boosting radiopharmaceutical capabilities.
news.summary: Nucleus RadioPharma revealed plans for the construction of cutting-edge facilities in Mesa, Arizona, and Springhouse, Pennsylvania, spanning an extensive area of more than 100,000 square feet. These state-of-the-art establishments mark a significant milestone as they integrate research, development, and commercial production functions within a single location, providing immense time and scope benefits for Nucleus' affiliates. The launch of these pioneering facilities signifies a leap for the radiopharmaceutical sector, facilitating innovative isotope applications and offering extensive production capacities to cater to a broad range of needs.

news.headline: Beacon (Nasdaq: BECN) partners with GAF to offer customers access to order GAF QuickMeasure™ reports through Beacon PRO+®.
news.summary: In Herndon, Virginia, Beacon, a top publicly traded wholesale distributor focusing on roofing, waterproofing, and related exterior products, has revealed a new collaboration with GAF. This partnership allows Beacon customers to easily request GAF QuickMeasure™ reports through Beacon PRO+®, a cutting-edge digital platform. Through the integration with GAF, contractors now have the opportunity to streamline the estimation process by ordering QuickMeasure reports, providing them with a reliable solution for accurate measurements. Become part of Beacon and GAF's initiative by utilizing this feature to enhance efficiency and precision in your projects.

news.headline: Heitman acquires self-storage site in Galway, Ireland for U-Store It, strengthening presence as leading provider.
news.summary: In London, Heitman LLC disclosed their acquisition of a self-storage site in Galway, Ireland. This move bolsters their U-Store It business, solidifying its position as the top self-storage provider in the country. The investment aligns with Heitman’s strategy of global core plus focus. This decision showcases confidence in the European self-storage sector and the expanding prospects in Ireland.

news.headline: Kiavi promotes Tim Lawlor to CFO and Jonathan Muller to SVP, Product and Technology, enhancing its executive team.
news.summary: A notable tech-enabled lender headquartered in San Francisco has recently appointed Tim Lawlor as Chief Financial Officer and Jonathan Muller as Senior Vice President of Product and Technology. This announcement was made on October 21, 2024. Kiavi, recognized for its lending services to residential real estate investors, emphasized the promotions of these two experienced individuals as part of their ongoing leadership strategy. Lawlor will now oversee financial operations, while Muller will lead the product and technology divisions. This move aims to further solidify Kiavi's position in the market and drive innovation within the company.

news.headline: GSE Solutions and Pelican Energy Partners increase merger consideration to $4.60 per share. Nasdaq: GVP.
news.summary: In Columbia, Maryland as of October 21, 2024, GSE Solutions, also known as GSE Systems, Inc. and traded on Nasdaq under GVP, disclosed its position as a prominent provider of advanced engineering solutions aiding the clean-energy generation and decarbonization efforts within the power sector. The company reported that it has...

news.headline: Toorak Capital Partners completes first RTL securitization of $166 million, backed by multifamily and mixed-use properties.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, Toorak Capital Partners LLC revealed the successful completion of their first residential transition loan (RTL) securitization named Toorak Mortgage Trust 2024-2 (TRK 2024-2). This securitization is backed by loans secured by small balance multifamily and mixed-use properties. The initial portfolio for TRK 2024-2, totaling $166 million, included 98 R...

news.headline: Investment in NYS parks yields $10m in sales, now rivaling agriculture's economic impact.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by Parks & Trails New York (PTNY), The Political Economy Research Institute (PERI), and The National Heritage Trust reveals that for every $1 million invested in New York State parks, it generates $10 million in sales. This research highlights the significant economic impact of investing in parks. The report also indicates that this investment contributes to the annual GDP of New York State, demonstrating the importance of funding for the parks sector.

news.headline: Studio Shed in Colorado wins housing grant, saving $240,000, offering discounts to customers on over 5,400 prefab projects.
news.summary: A reputable manufacturer of prefabricated structures based in Louisville, Colorado, Studio Shed, has revealed its plans to provide discounts and enhance efficiency for turnkey ADUs. With a track record of delivering over 5,400 prebuilt residential and commercial projects since its establishment in 2008, the company aims to offer a significant discount of $240,000 on its services. This move is expected to benefit customers seeking affordable and streamlined solutions for accessory dwelling units.

news.headline: Oakworth Capital Inc. sees 23% rise in year-to-date diluted EPS, reports $4.1 million net income in Q3 2024.
news.summary: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. - Oakworth Capital Inc. (OTCQX: OAKC) announced a significant rise in profitability thanks to balanced growth strategies. In the third quarter of 2024, the company reported a net income of $4.1 million. Year-to-date 2024 results were even more impressive, reaching $11.7 million, representing a notable 24% increase compared to the same period last year when it stood at $9.4 million.

news.headline: Blue Shield of California and Salesforce partnering to simplify prior authorizations with new platform, streamlining 20+ systems.
news.summary: A nonprofit health plan has developed a prior authorization platform using Salesforce Health Cloud which will integrate with physician systems to collect essential clinical data from electronic health records and simplify processes currently spread across over 20 systems. This initiative aims to provide efficient prior authorization for members and physicians, reducing delays and improving overall healthcare delivery.

news.headline: 30,000 enthusiasts join Dalian Marathon, igniting the city with passion on Oct. 20, 2024.
news.summary: In Dalian, China, the 34th annual Dalian Marathon began at 7:30 on October 20, 2024, with an impressive 30,000 marathon enthusiasts taking part in the event. These participants eagerly raced past the starting line and proceeded to traverse the city streets, displaying their passion for running in the pleasant cool weather. Along their path, these runners were enthusiastically cheered on by supporters who lined the route.

news.headline: LRT Company fully subscribes $5 million ground lease DST offering near Hilton Head Island. Regulatory D private placement fully subscribed.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, in Hardeeville, South Carolina, LRT Company, a development firm specializing in Section 1031 investment offerings, revealed the successful completion of its Regulation D private placement offering, LRT Island Gateway 5 DST. The offering, which was all-cash, managed to reach full subscription.

news.headline: Duracell partners with Formula 1 Heineken Silver Las Vegas Grand Prix; to sponsor DRS Zone at the race in 2024.
news.summary: Las Vegas Grand Prix, Inc. revealed that Duracell, a prominent battery manufacturer, is set to be the official battery partner for the FORMULA 1 HEINEKEN SILVER LAS VEGAS GRAND PRIX 2024. This collaboration will see Duracell supporting a DRS Zone at the Las Vegas Strip Circuit™, a crucial part of the track allowing drivers to activate their drag reduction system for a competitive advantage. This partnership signifies the merger of high-speed innovation and top-tier performance at the event.

news.headline: Total Expert launches Engage SMS, allowing lenders to connect with customers in real time through compliant two-way conversations, driving loyalty and conversions.
news.summary: Minneapolis-based Total Expert, a top player in the financial services sector for customer engagement software, recently introduced Engage SMS. This specialized texting tool allows lenders to engage in compliant, real-time, two-way conversations with clients, fostering loyalty and boosting conversions. Engage SMS provides lenders with a convenient means to communicate using the highly popular medium of texting, enabling communication through various devices such as mobile phones, laptops, or desktops.

news.headline: Daktronics, Inc. is implementing a business transformation plan to accelerate growth and increase margins.
news.summary: The Business Transformation Office is leading efforts to drive strategic initiatives aimed at accelerating profitable growth. Their goal is to increase margins and achieve consistent returns on invested capital in the mid-to-high teens.

news.headline: Kolmar BNH, the manufacturer of HemoHim in South Korea, receives NAI classification from US FDA for Sejong plant.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, Kolmar BNH, the manufacturer of HemoHim, has recently received a No Action Indicated (NAI) classification for its Sejong plant after an inspection conducted by the FDA. This classification signifies that the plant was found to be in compliance with FDA standards.

news.headline: Seoul Court dismisses MBK-Young Poong's second injunction, upholding Korea Zinc's management defense.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, the Seoul Central District Court has dismissed a second injunction filed by MBK-Young Poong Group to suspend Korea Zinc's (KRX:010130) share buyback, aimed at gaining control of the company. This is the alliance's second unsuccessful attempt, following a previous dismissal of their initial injunction. The motive behind MBK-Young Poong's repeated injunction filings is to raise uncertainty around Korea Zinc's share buyback and instigate concern among stakeholders.

news.headline: CoinSwitch Co-Founder reports $75M transferred from WazirX to global exchanges after hack, using new dashboard.
news.summary: CoinSwitch has launched a new dashboard that monitors the transfer of funds from WazirX's revealed wallets. This tool provides real-time updates on the movement of assets, offering insights into the flow of funds from these wallets. It serves as a useful resource for users and investors to track the movement of funds, ensuring transparency and accountability. The dashboard showcases key data such as the amounts transferred, the frequency of transactions, and other relevant information related to the movement of funds from WazirX's disclosed wallets. This initiative aims to enhance visibility and monitoring of fund transfers in the cryptocurrency space.

news.headline: Global compound feeds and additives market valued at $508.1 billion in 2023, expected to grow at 3.8% to reach $636.0 billion by 2029, with Asia-Pacific leading at a 4.4% CAGR to reach $232.3 billion. Leading manufacturers include Charoen Pokphand Foods, ADM, ForFarmers, CHS, and AB Agri.
news.summary: The global compound feeds and additives market was valued at $508.1 billion in 2023, and is projected to increase at a growth rate of 3.8% from 2024 to 2029, reaching $636.0 billion by the end of the forecast period. Asia-Pacific was the leading region in 2023, attributed to the increasing demand for poultry and meat products. The Asia-Pacific market is estimated to grow at a CAGR of 4.4% through 2029, reaching $232.3 billion by the end of the forecast period.

news.headline: ŌURA unveils first Perimenopause Report using data from 100k female members, highlighting physiological changes pre, during, and post menopause.
news.summary: In San Francisco, ŌURA, known for its smart ring, has unveiled their inaugural Perimenopause Report during Menopause Awareness Month. Researchers at ŌURA analyzed data from over 100,000 female Oura Members in the early perimenopause, late perimenopause, and early postmenopause stages for a year. The study aimed to uncover physiological changes before, during, and after menopause, shedding light on this period of women’s lives.
